extraction.one_line_summary: HINDLEY attacked with KÄMNA pacing support on Marmolada final 3km, cracked CARAPAZ to gain 1:25 and effectively win the Giro before final TT
tactical_patterns: KÄMNA planted in early break as satellite rider, paced HINDLEY final 3km when breakaway was caught—pre-positioned domestique tactic
CARAPAZ cracked inside final 3km after SIVAKOV pacing ended, suggesting team resource depletion on extended climb more critical than fitness
NOVAK from early break finished 2nd stage, showing BAHRAIN seeded multiple riders forward for dual stage-hunting and GC-support options
HINDLEY attacked immediately after SIVAKOV pulled off, exploiting precise moment CARAPAZ lost team shelter on steepest Marmolada gradient

rider_signals.HINDLEY Jai: positive: gained 1:25 on rival after launching first offensive, showing superior form reversal from 2020 when he lost similar margin in final TT
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: cracked badly final 3km despite only defending 3-second lead, catastrophic collapse suggests overcooked earlier efforts or illness
rider_signals.KÄMNA Lennard: positive: successfully executed satellite rider role by surviving 52km in break then perfectly pacing HINDLEY through CARAPAZ collapse
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: moved from 1:05 deficit to podium contention, passing collapsed CARAPAZ to close gap to 1:51
rider_signals.SIVAKOV Pavel: neutral: paced final 5km but team lost pink when he pulled off, highlighting risk of single high-altitude pacer strategy
rider_signals.BUCHMANN Emanuel: negative: dropped in opening kilometers of final climb, confirming weakness on sustained 10%+ gradients despite satellite positioning
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: lost contact early on Marmolada despite needing to defend 4th, sentiment ride overshadowed declining climbing capacity
rider_signals.COVI Alessandro: positive: soloed from 52km out over Pordoi to win stage, showing exceptional diesel engine on consecutive HC climbs
rider_signals.NOVAK Domen: positive: reduced 2:20 gap to 30 seconds chasing solo COVI final 5km, elite time trial climbing ability at altitude
rider_signals.BILBAO Pello: neutral: finished top-5 on stage maintaining 5th GC, BAHRAIN depth chart extended beyond LANDA with multiple options
